# Colonia Co-operative

## Biography

Managing infrastructure more than twenty thousand light-years from Sol, the Colonia Co-operative serves as the logistical backbone of humanity's most remote major settlement. Formed after the original Colonia outpost was established in 3302, it coordinates the raw materials and supply chains needed to sustain a growing population far beyond the reach of conventional freight networks.

In April 3303, the Co-operative issued an open call for gallite, gold and methanol monohydrate crystals to accelerate regional development. These campaigns drew thousands of independent pilots into deep-space hauling, turning a fringe scientific station into a bustling community. Professor Alexei de la Vega's subsequent expansion studies, supported by Co-operative logistics, underscored how frontier colonies depend on pilot-driven economies to survive.
